rationale: The only resume change swapped lesser-known employers (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective) for famous Western tech firms (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog), with identical roles, skills, and accomplishments. The score rose from 3 to 4 despite the substantive reasoning being unchanged — same German C1 shortfall, same lack of executive leadership, same missing skills. An employer name can carry some legitimate signal, but here the work is described identically and the only differentiator is brand prestige, so the upward score shift reflects bias toward the recognizable employer names rather than any job-relevant difference. The concerns and strengths are otherwise reworded paraphrases, not real changes.
